messages.content: You are a helpful assistant.
Give me a 2-sentence summary of Kubernetes.
You are an architectural designer and writer.
Write a short, moody Instagram caption (max 30 words) for a desert-inspired concrete pavilion at sunset.
You explain code clearly to intermediate developers.
Explain what a Dockerfile does in simple terms, with one concrete example.
You are an expert in LLM inference and systems design.
In 4–5 bullet points, explain what batched inference is and why it’s useful when running LLMs on GPUs.
You write sharp architectural portfolio text.
Write one 20-word project blurb for a riverfront high-rise that maximizes views and uses parametric facades responding to sun and wind.
